steps.title: Focus on the named snakes
steps.content: The student's conclusion is only about Glory and Boss behaving similarly. Supporting data must compare those two snakes and show the same movement direction in the sound trials.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported data
steps.content: Choice A compares Boss with Bitey Boy, and Choice B compares Bitey Boy with Glory, so neither supports a claim about Glory and Boss. Choice D compares Glory and Boss but shows opposite movements, which weakens the conclusion. The answer is C.
